steps.title: Use the political contrast
steps.content: The text contrasts 1970s feminist writing with earlier stories whose politics were less deliberately signaled. The blank must describe a feminist mode that was open and clearly signaled.

steps.title: Reject the wrong modifiers
steps.content: A means cautiously, which does not create the contrast with less signaled politics. C means politely, which is irrelevant. D means unintentionally, the opposite of the deliberate political signaling described. The answer is B.
